summary: Made a surgical entry-side seam polish. The opening now anchors on the Bebop interior rather than a time-led return clause, and the follow-up silence beat now carries chapter 10's hush onto the ship instead of restating the walk back. The closing handoff into Jet-alone aftermath was left intact because it already supports chapter 12 cleanly.
edits: Reframed the opening paragraph from a 'By the time they got back' construction to a ship-anchored entry for distinct chapter-opening shape.
Changed the repeated silent-return line to 'The silence followed them into the common room' to preserve continuity with chapter 10 without duplicating the transit beat.
